tasks.label: check-baas-publish-state
tasks.command: set -e; echo 'local mini-baas 0.0.1 images:'; docker images --format '{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}' | grep -E '^mini-baas/.+:0\.0\.1$' | sort || true; echo 'remote tag:'; git -C apps/baas/mini-baas-infra ls-remote --tags origin 'refs/tags/v0.0.1' || true; echo 'track-binocle containers:'; docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}' | grep mini-baas-track-binocle || true

tasks.label: check-registry-manifests
tasks.command: echo 'GHCR kong:'; docker manifest inspect ghcr.io/univers42/mini-baas-infra/kong:0.0.1 >/dev/null && echo yes || echo missing; echo 'DockerHub kong:'; docker manifest inspect docker.io/dlesieur/mini-baas-infra-kong:0.0.1 >/dev/null && echo yes || echo missing

tasks.label: login-ghcr-dockerhub
tasks.command: set -e; if command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1 && gh auth token >/tmp/gh-token 2>/dev/null; then cat /tmp/gh-token | docker login ghcr.io -u univers42 --password-stdin >/dev/null && echo 'ghcr-login-ok'; rm -f /tmp/gh-token; else echo 'ghcr-login-missing'; fi; set -a; . apps/baas/mini-baas-infra/.env; set +a; if [ -n "${DOCKER_LOGIN:-}" ] && [ -n "${DOCKER_PAT:-}" ]; then printf '%s' "$DOCKER_PAT" | docker login docker.io -u "$DOCKER_LOGIN" --password-stdin >/dev/null && echo 'dockerhub-login-ok'; else echo 'dockerhub-login-missing'; fi
